Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The shrine is bustling with[n]people enjoying the festival.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Coming here by myself feels a little lonely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Those are masks. They're worn over the face as a form of recreation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}One can find enjoyment by hiding one's face?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Hiding your face isn't the objective, exactly. Rather, you get to experience having a different one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Hm... Putting this into words is proving difficult...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}So then, by wearing a different face, you are able to become a different version of yourself?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Yes, that's about right. Your degree of comprehension is actually quite stunning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}At this rate, a few more tests and the chairman may give you permission to go out on your own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After looking around a bit longer,[n]I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
